text_block_list.name: Flashy Part-Timer
text_block_list.text:
Huh? Morning shift again today, Ines? I feel like I
see you all the time lately.

text_block_list.name: Flashy Part-Timer
text_block_list.text:
Come to think of it, my boyfriend said he saw you
working at some other place...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Hehe, yep! I've started another part-time job.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Ah, darn it. I've gotta get to class! Let's chat
again next time we have a shift together!

text_block_list.name: Flashy Part-Timer
text_block_list.text: ...Yeah, okay. Hang in there!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As we complete our final preparations for the
Kikuka Sho, something about Ines Fujin seems
off...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Pant... pant... Urgh...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She has a bleak expression on her face, and her
lap time reflects her shortness of breath.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's a mediocre time—a far cry from her personal
best. Attempting to suppress her natural instincts
has caused her form to become rigid...
choice_data_list: (She's in a bit of a slump...)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
If she doesn't break out of this rut soon, it might
have serious implications for her future
performances.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: What's up, Trainer?
choice_data_list: You don't need to force yourself so much.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I've been striving to help Ines develop a new
running style because I believed that was the best
way to address her stamina issues.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But if taking on that challenge is just causing
more issues for her, we might be better off going
back to her original running style.
choice_data_list: Don't forget I'm here to support you.
Don't forget I'm here to support you.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
I'm fine, I'm fine! Rather than worrying, I want you
to sit back and expect big things!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
I want to show my family that I'll always be
brimming with energy, no matter how tough the
race!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: ...Because I know those two will be watching.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The day of the Kikuka Sho has arrived. Ines Fujin
has her eyes tightly shut, as if trying to suppress
her excitement.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Bzzzt... Bzzzt...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Oh—someone's calling me! Huh? But this number
is...

text_block_list.name: Shift Supervisor
text_block_list.text:
Hello? Is this Ines Fujin? Where are you at the
moment?

text_block_list.name: Shift Supervisor
text_block_list.text:
As it's your first day working with us, I wanted to
give you a quick rundown of your duties. But you
didn't show up to the assigned meeting place.

text_block_list.name: Shift Supervisor
text_block_list.text: Um? Hello? I don't have the wrong number, do I?

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: I-I'm so sorry! I'm sorry! I'm sorry! I'm—

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Ines Fujin's face suddenly turns pale before my
eyes, so I take the phone and speak for her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In short, she accidentally scheduled a shift at her
new part-time job that overlaps with the race.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After apologizing profusely, we're able to settle
the matter without it turning into too big of an
incident.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: I'm sorry, Trainer. I messed up...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Nothing like this has ever happened before...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I tell Ines Fujin that I'll explain the situation to her
employer so that she doesn't have to shoulder the
blame alone.
choice_data_list: Take a deep breath and focus on the race.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
choice_data_list: Show everyone how much you enjoy racing!
Show everyone how much you enjoy racing!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: O-okay... You're right!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
At the very least, I've gotta redeem myself on the
track!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I follow behind her as she hurries out of the
waiting room.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She shouldn't be left alone right now. The least I
can do is wave to her from the side of the
paddock.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I want to do whatever I can to support her, no
matter how small...
